summary: Tested new Lelang Ikan (fish-sales) feature backend + frontend. 43/43 backend pytest pass (12 new fish-sales tests + 31 regression). Frontend flow verified: PETUGAS_LAPANG can record CASH and POTONG_UTANG sales with live preview (Bruto/Tunai); NELAYAN sees read-only listing without add button; Calculator route loads with calc-error testid in source. Vessels listing now includes owner_outstanding. POTONG_UTANG deduction loop confirmed: deducts oldest-first, marks transactions LUNAS, cash remainder paid when gross > outstanding. Notifications created for fisherman after every sale.

issues: Dev-mode hydration warning: <span> cannot be a child of <option>. Caused by emergent visual-edit wrapper injecting <span style=display:contents> inside <option>. Not user-visible in production builds but pollutes console; safe to ignore unless production build also warns.

action_items: Optional: dedupe/clean accumulated TEST_ vessels created by previous testing iterations (cosmetic, does not affect correctness).

Optional: add a server-side cap so PETUGAS_LAPANG cannot create POTONG_UTANG sale when owner_outstanding == 0 to give clearer UX (currently it just sets amount_deducted=0 and pays full cash, which is correct math but might confuse user).
critical_code_review_comments: FishSales.js live preview uses Math.min(gross, owner_outstanding) for UI; backend uses real-time DB lookup. They can diverge if multiple sales occur quickly — backend authoritative, so OK.

create_fish_sale lacks idempotency key; double-click on sale-submit could create duplicates (submit button is disabled when required fields empty but not after submit). Consider disabling button while POST is in-flight.
owner_outstanding query inside list_vessels runs an extra Mongo find per vessel (N+1). Acceptable at current scale but should aggregate if vessel count grows.
test_credentials: Demo logins via POST /api/auth/demo {role: NELAYAN|PETUGAS_LAPANG|ADMIN|PETUGAS_DINAS}. Seeded NELAYAN owns 2 vessels + DP debt.
seed_data_creation: Each POTONG_UTANG test creates a small DP transaction first to ensure deterministic deduction math regardless of prior state.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Lelang Ikan flows verified end-to-end. Backend test file /app/backend/tests/test_fish_sales.py covers CASH math, POTONG_UTANG deduction (partial + excess), price override, role guard, validation, notification, owner_outstanding. Reuse for regression. NELAYAN dashboard fish-sales listing has a brief race where Empty state may render before fetch completes — add ~1s wait after navigation when asserting rows. DB has accumulated TEST_ vessels from past runs (cosmetic only).
